channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The strange triumph of Rosie the Robot
item.description: Hello again, and thank you for spending time with Fast Company’s Plugged In. Last October, I visited the Silicon Valley headquarters of 1X Technologies—the startup behind a humanoid home robot called Neo—and spoke with its VP of product and design, Dar Sleeper.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Arc Raiders Cold Snap update release date
item.description: The Arc Raiders Cold Snap update arrives soon. Here's the release date, and what we know about new quests, map conditions, and more.
item.dc:creator: Jake Green, TechRadar

item.title: Trouble in Toyland: New A.I. pals can discuss sex, God, playing with matches
item.description: Granted, it's unlikely a 5-year-old would ask an A.I. buddy about kink. But researchers say parents should know that such toys are programmed to give a lot of detailed, sometimes graphic answers.
item.dc:creator: Teri Sforza, The Mercury News

item.title: Aetherflux joins the race to launch orbital data centers by 2027
item.description: Aetherflux says it will launch its first solar powered orbital data center satellite in the first quarter of 2027, joining SpaceX, Amazon, Google, and Starcloud in a race to move computing infrastructure off-planet as AI’s energy demands outpace terrestrial data center capacity.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI is stepping into the fight for supply chain resilience and battlefield readiness
item.description: "I do think there's going to be a bit of a learning curve tempered by the fact that a lot of people are using large language models now," said John Garrity. The post AI is stepping into the fight for supply chain resilience and battlefield readiness first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Adapt or be deceived: The shape-shifting nature of fraud
item.description: As digital innovation evolves, so too does the surface area for fraud. And with each advance, deception quickly fills loopholes designers never intended to leave. Yet, as we close 2025, what’s changing now isn’t the intent, it’s the instrumentation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: PythoC: A new way to generate C code from Python
item.description: Python and C share more than it might seem. The reference version of the Python interpreter is written in C, and many of the third-party libraries written for Python wrap C code. It’s also possible to generate C code from Python.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to spot wallet verification scam emails
item.description: Scammers are sending fake MetaMask wallet verification emails using official branding to steal crypto information through phishing links and fraudulent domains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harvard hit by new breach after phone phishing attack
item.description: A phone phishing attack compromised Harvard's alumni and donor database, marking the second security incident at the university in recent months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
